messages.text: Hello, testing
It was great to meet everyone! Excited to start working more closely! @all
Let's GO 🚀🚀🚀
Wooo ✨

@Atomic Fungi Hey Colin, Faire Market is this weekend and we have one retailer in MA that is interested in purchasing through there. 

@Jared Ferreira can you provide Colin with the buyer name and email so that we can send them an invite.
This retailer is in RI. I think their first order will go through me, I offered them an introductory deal; if they buy two full cases they get the third half off on their first order.
Excellent
@all Thank you all again for your time this morning. I've emailed out the Team Launch Agreement for your signatures. Lucky to be working with such awesome people.
Appreciate you man, happy to help bring your idea to life
Let's get this show on the road
https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1LfCxosN4XrBIEQJnooDt4-K0UnN4P-kS4KeJQZ2w0sU/edit?usp=sharing
@Atomic Fungi FYI doc was sent to this email, not your personal. Once you sign, it will send to the next person.

Hey ya'll! Here's the new strat for Instagram/TikTok and Sparkplug. Take a peak and let me know if any of you can speak to or send me insight to any of the posts. I'll hit you all up individually to ask some questions or for context pertaining to your role so I can translate the qualitative data to content. https://docs.google.com/document/d/15XaRA9pKFFvGHnqh_qeCWKU_U8bVdQ7ezX33m4aPkMQ/edit?usp=sharing
Let me know any feedback by Tuesday? Thanks in advance
Hey Kat! This looks AWESOME so far. Can you give all of us editing access or the ability to comment?
Thank you! Yes, will do
Gotcha, thanks Kat!
Signed a few days, lemme know if I gotta do anything else 🫡
No prob!

Hey! We’re running a 30% off promo on Faire. Wanted to let everyone know in case we want to share on socials or with retailers we’re in communication with. Details below:

30% off all SKUs
Code: ATOMIC30
Expires: 1/31/26
Order Minimum: $100 aka at least one case

AF - Team Chat

Awesome! 

SN: Haven't heard back from Sparkplug rep yet. Any way we want to tackle handing that over this week if she's AWOL?
I'll ping her once more.
Will get something on this out by Sat (static post and reel)
@Jakyla Londonwill post tomorrow.
Copy that
Thank you all so much for the great work and steady communication.

Hey team, content for next week (IG) is ready in this folder
https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1W355H7UMQykMFVylF1sF8wyFZdvdUmCv?usp=share_link
If any of the content makes you think of something or sparks an idea, feel free to message me!

Congrats on closing 3 accounts this week. 

1. Coastal Healing Dispensary 
2. The Natural Way Supplement Store
3. DDM Cannabis Dispensary 

Also, 25 teapots were purchased by Kauai Juice Company tonight via Faire. They are loving these teapots on Faire!!

@Atomic Fungi or @Jakyla London please try to upsell tea. I sent samples with their last teapot order. 

Please ask him what he liked about the teapots and for a review!
@Katrina Jones can you recommend the best way to ask if we can collaborate on a post? They have like 30k followers last time I checked.
Sure, just confirming, is this their IG? https://www.instagram.com/kauaijuiceco?igsh=MWJmNGo1OGRnNWQ3YQ==

Since the Teapots are a hit I think we do a carousel with the teas incorporated in the last couple of slides. So that they see it as beneficial to them, we can include their specific location in the second or third slide. The content piece I'm thinking of now is "Why everyone prefers this teapot" or "We keep selling out of this teapot". This format would inform how we ask them.

Message: Hi Kauai Juice Co! We're thrilled to see that our teapots are in demand at your store. We'd love to collaborate on a carousel highlighting why everyone prefers to choose this tea pot + include your exact store location in the second or third slide (so folks know where to get it in person). Is there any feed back you've received in particular regarding the teapots? If not, let us know your review of them and we'll include it in the carousel!

Best,
The Atomic Fungi Team
SparkPlug content ready for review https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1W355H7UMQykMFVylF1sF8wyFZdvdUmCv?usp=share_link
Yes that is them
Kat, can you send this to them via IG?
Owner isn't very responsive on Faire
Sure thing, will send now

I'm hindsight, $3 is insane lol

Let's make it $2 for taking the course and remove the sampling program for now as well as the posting.
Okay copy that. So only mention: if they take the course they get $2/per box?
Actually, nvm sorry
$1 only
And they have to take the course to start earning
Okay bet so they take the course (get $1 from this) and they can earn $1/per box (but must take course to start earning)
confirming this DM was sent
Hello

I did
No worries I found it

Hey! @Katrina Jones I want to avoid having our emails look stale by using more than just our current product photos. Do you happen to have a folder of what you’ve taken for social media? Happy with UGC, designs, b-roll, etc. Anything is welcome!
Hey! I don't have it all in one place on hand but could definitely collect them and add them to a Google folder. I can get you this by Wednesday. Is that good?
That totally works. Thank you! @Katrina Jones
No prob

Hey @all Not sure who’s best to ask, but I’m trying to get a more detailed look on our Klaviyo email analytics.

Is there any chance I can have my Shopify access to be upgraded to see our orders? Don’t need anything extra, but it’ll allow me to locate specific orders triggered by Klaviyo & cross analyze results.

Thank you!
I got you
Just made you admin
Adding Tomi in all poses with transparent BG in content files for convenience
Thank you.

Amazing
Can i give you the image files?
Wym? Like different ones for the course? Sure
As in the actual png's as opposed to the ones i pasted into our document
Oh! Yes
Lol yeah there's no way for to download from document so I had to screenshot

okay
do you like these as they are? or did you want to make them in canva?
Good morning, to add Tomi I'd have transfer to canva but should be easy to mirror the design that's in SparkPlug right now. I saved the template in canva. Just gotta plug and play
Awesome, I think that's the right move.
The copy in the document is right
copy that

My bad, I'm quality checking right now
no worries! I literally just finished

Thanks Jakyla

I'll take care of this one and CC you!
Okay great
Hey! I may have an upcoming sample request depending on if a retailer is interested. Do we send our samples in the branded boxes or just in bags? @Jakyla London
Awesome! In bags & we just got the official info cards so each sample will have one attached.
Oh cool, thank you! I'll see what the retailer says about samples @Jakyla London
Thanks Colin!!!
@Jakyla London Major Bloom reached out to Jared to let him know samples have arrived! Thanks again!
Awesome!

Quick question, if I got to have a monthly allotment of samples to give out to budtenders on IG--how many could I have? Lol 

Been engaging with budtenders on IG and think it could be an easy way for us to get in their stores. LMK if any restrictions would apply.
Good question! No limit as of now. Just send the info (dispensary name, budtender name, quantity, etc) to this chat and Giovanni or myself will send them out.
Cool beans! Thank you

Hey @Jakyla London Airgoods is running a big sample program that would be great for exposure. I'm filling out a form to get the address (somewhere in Brooklyn). Shooting to have full details for you today, but I know they would like samples by the 13th. @Giovanni Estrella Thanks for grabbing that email, happy to facilitate

Hey Jakyla London update on the request above:

Airgoods Sample Program

Airgoods
C/O Portal Warehousing
14 53rd St, Suite 618
Brooklyn, NY 11232

Arrive by Friday, March 13th (if we are unable to make this deadline, let me know so I can alert the Airgoods rep)

For the amount, Airgoods said “Any quantity works too — most brands send enough samples for 50 stores, but you can send a lot less (a case) or more too (up to a pallet).” Happy to work with what we have in stock for each flavor SKU.

When you ship, can you please tell me how much we sent of each SKU, the tracking numbers and the carrier we used. They require it for the program.

Thank you so much!
@Jakyla London
Hi @Atomic Fungi Colin 😊 thank you for the details. I’ll send you an update in a few hours.
Hi @Atomic Fungi Colin, we’re going to need to extended the delivery date to the Monday, the 16th if possible. Let me know if they have a preferred date.
That should be ok. I can email their rep to let them know. @Jakyla London
Okay thank you I’ll send the quantity info you requested to the chat once everything is packaged
Sounds good, just emailed them
Hey @Jakyla London they said that date works!
Wonderful.
